workflow.name: OrchestKit Full Eval Pipeline
workflow.description: Weekly full evaluation: triggers GitHub Actions workflow for CC-based eval, then analyzes results and posts regression report.

steps.instruction:
The GitHub Actions eval workflow has completed.

1. Read the workflow run results from {{outputs.trigger-eval-gha.message}}
2. Check if eval-results.json artifact is available
3. Analyze the results:
   - How many test suites passed vs failed?
   - Were there any security test failures?
   - What's the skill trigger coverage?
   - Any TypeScript type errors?
4. Compare against the previous run baseline (check recent issue comments for prior results)
5. Post an issue comment on the OrchestKit tracking issue with:

## Weekly Eval Report — {{date}}

### Suite Results
| Suite | Status | vs Last Week |
(table)

### Skill Eval
- Trigger coverage: X/Y skills
- Structure validation: X pass, X fail
- Regressions: (list any)
- Improvements: (list any)

### Health Score: X/10

Flag any regressions prominently. If all green, keep it brief.
